name: Kenvue Inc.
summary: PART I Company Overview At Kenvue, our purpose is to realize the extraordinary power of everyday care. As a global leader at the intersection of healthcare and consumer goods, we are the worlds largest pure-play consumer health company by revenue with $15.1 billion in Net sales in the fiscal year 2025. By combining the power of science with meaningful consumer insights and our digital strategy, we empower consumers to live healthier lives every day.
